name: Creamy Beef & Macaroni
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Miracle Whip or Miracle Whip
1 package Elbow macaroni, cooked, drained (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain.
2. Add spaghetti sauce, Miracle Whip, and cooked macaroni to the pan. Stir occasionally.
3. Heat until everything is well combined and heated through.
4. Top with shredded cheddar cheese.
